description:
Sundry is a WinGet local manifest management tool that makes it easier for you to remove manifests, make changes to them, and also aids in updating them.


Fix 
- fix: Fix cat command: UnboundLocalError: cannot access local variable '区域设置' where it is not associated with a value. (#6) by @DuckDuckStudio
Full changelog: https://github.com/DuckDuckStudio/Sundry/compare/1.1.6...1.1.7
